title: [MTR3/4]Tianjin Metro Line 1 DKZ9 train
description: Add a Tianjin Metro Line 1 DKZ9 train into the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
# English
A train resource pack of Minecraft Transit Railway mod. The pack added a DKZ9 train which is operating by Tianjin Metro Line 1.

This train works with a obj model and javascript head displays.

The pack support both MTR 3.x and MTR 4.x. For MTR 3.x versions, the [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mod is requests. For MTR 4.x versions, please make sure that your MTR mod is up to date. The gangway may have problems on the MTR 4.x versions. The javascript contrents will **NOT** work on MTR 4.x versions.

You can edit this pack freely for your personaly uses. No secondary distribution is allowed, including the original files that have not been modified and the modified files.
# 中文
本资源包添加了适用于Minecraft Transit Railway mod的天津地铁1号线DKZ9型列车。

列车使用obj模型，配有JavaScript驱动的头显。

资源包支持MTR 3.x和MTR4.x版本。3.x版本需要安装[NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mod。4.x版本请确保是最新版。4.x版本的贯通道可能会有一定问题。JavaScript头显不支持MTR 4.x版本。

您可以自由编辑本资源包以便个人使用，禁止二次发布，包括未经修改的原始文件和修改后的文件。
